# Barsky Design

> Portfolio of Hiram Barsky — Lead Product Designer & AI Innovator based in Clifton, NJ. 15+ years designing user-centered digital experiences across fintech, healthcare, and AI products.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, hero, featured case studies, services and contact.
- [About](/about): Background, philosophy, and experience as a Gen-AI-first product designer.
- [Services](/services): UX/UI design, AI integration, and product strategy services.
- [Design Services — UX/UI](/design-services/ux-ui-design): UX research, interaction design, and UI systems.
- [Design Services — Mobile App Design](/design-services/mobile-app-design): iOS/Android product design and prototyping.
- [Design Services — Web Development](/design-services/web-development): Modern, AI-assisted React/Vite web builds.
- [Store](/store): Downloadable design templates and resources.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on UX, design systems, AI, and career growth.
- [Contact](/contact): Project inquiries and consultation requests.

## Case studies

- [HerbaLink](/project/herbalink): Healthcare marketplace connecting users with herbalists.
- [SplitTime](/project/splittime): Co-parenting coordination app reducing conflict.
- [Crypto Trading Platform](/project/crypto): Fintech UX simplifying complex trading flows.
- [SmarterHealth](/project/smarterhealth): Healthcare experience modernization.
- [Business Management](/project/business-management): B2B operations platform UX.
- [Investor Loan App](/project/investor-loan-app): Fintech loan origination platform.
- [Medication App](/project/medication-app): Healthcare medication tracking and adherence.
- [Gold2Crypto](/project/gold2crypto): Crypto exchange onboarding for non-crypto users.
- [DAE Search](/project/dae-search): Enterprise data discovery and search.
- [BarskyJoint](/project/barskyjoint): Restaurant ordering system.

- [User Research on a Shoestring Budget](/blog/user-research-shoestring-budget)
- [AI in Design](/blog/ai-in-design)
- [Case Study Writing](/blog/case-study-writing)
